content:
While I know that asking for rebalance isn't really a viable thing to do because the dev team has their own priority. But I would still like to leave a note stuck to the door as a wanda enthusiast. 

Currently I believe that she is incredibly easily outdone by almost every character in her niche as a counter generator. 

Her 4 cost card is not as powerful in the current ecosystem and generally doesnt justify the cost of using it. 

Her 3 cost's refund makes her viable to do dps but it doesn't really benefit wanda as much as it is right now as her job in the current meta is to generate as much counter as possible.

This means that out of her entire kit, the only reason people are using her is for her exalt, which sometimes gives good counter if you have 5 dreamlure but sometimes it doesn't do much at all. The base effect of her exalt is too weak allowing for an easy fail state for newer players.

I feel like this isn't a very good spot for wanda to be in.

She wants to be the str debuffer but she loses to goliath.

She wants to be the counter generator but loses to caecus's 2 cost. 

She wants to do damage but is dependent on generating counter, meaning daffodil + pandia is more viable than her in harder content. 

Her dreamlure mechanic is almost negligible at this point and the aliemus cap increases works against her job as a counter generator.

I still enjoy using wanda and will continue to use her but I really want to at least knock on the door of my favorite developer that this long forgotten character may require some spot in the sunlight.

Thank you!

Another point to make,

During arc 1, counter was the most powerful team. But it also made the gameplay very bland and slow.

If that is the case, with the new design philosophy of a lot of the current content in morimens.

Wouldn't it be better to do get rid of counter entirely and rework the counter based characters into their own niche? 

I feel like the gameplay of counter hasn't evolved much and there is no real need to make counter be the ultra passive damage.
another “rebalance X awakener” has hit the qa thread, wonder how Doresian players will react

My goal is only to just leave a ping for the devs to know that wanda enjoyers still exist. 

We all know how much they have been trying to move away from ultra counter and with ultra always getting memed on despite being in a solid spot right now, they're trying to build a new image for the ultra realm awakers. 

I wouldn't like to see an awaker get forgotten in a game about rememberance.
true that, here’s hoping they give Wanda literally anything, maybe after the third Tulu buff <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>

One small thing, that could at least give a small help, would be the change in the arc2 counter scaling, favoring more permanent counter in comparison to temporary one https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1455882869410103458
推 我也需要這個功能<:Cheerup:1400771555939844149>

Using "Tiny Wish" through Unforgotten Twilight (i.e. as the second posse this turn) consistently brings up the awakener selection panel twice, with the first selection panel working as normal and the second one doing nothing

So i was playing my newly prepared Liz team, with the Posses in the screenshots.
did "Undying Sun" the previous turn and had 14/9 arithmetica when i decided to use "A Mouse's Wisdom".
IT REDUCED ME FROM 14 ARITHMETICA TO 8, and caused me to lose the match.
I'm not sure if it's a bug or not, but nothing regarding that interaction is mentioned anywhere.
